name: Sandstorm Gold Royalties Ltd.
description: Sandstorm Gold Royalties Ltd. is a gold-focused royalty and streaming company that acquires royalties and precious metals purchase agreements from mining companies worldwide. The company holds a portfolio of over 250 royalties and streams across projects in North America, South and Central America, Africa, and Asia-Pacific. As a royalty company, Sandstorm provides upfront capital to miners in exchange for a percentage of mine production over the life of the asset.
